vdb_search_docs.name: vdb_search_docs
vdb_search_docs.description: Document-level semantic retrieval from the vector store for broad topical recall.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of document-level hits. Default 5.

vdb_get_docs_by_document_ids.name: vdb_get_docs_by_document_ids
vdb_get_docs_by_document_ids.description: Fetch raw document chunks by document_id from the vector store.

vdb_search_hierdocs.name: vdb_search_hierdocs
vdb_search_hierdocs.description: Parent-child semantic retrieval: recall relevant sentences, aggregate them to parent passages or documents, then rerank.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of parent-level hits. Default 20.

vdb_search_sentences.name: vdb_search_sentences
vdb_search_sentences.description: Sentence-level semantic retrieval for fine-grained evidence and paraphrased local details.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sentence hits. Default 5.
